title: Two-factor authentication
subtitle: Secure your admin account with a TOTP code.
errorSetup: Unable to generate the 2FA key. Please try again later.
errorInvalidCode: Invalid code. Check your phone's time and try again.
activatedDescription: You will now need to use the admin login with your TOTP code.

step1.title: 1. Scan the QR code
step1.description: With Google Authenticator, Authy, or any other TOTP app.
step1.manualHint: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:

step2.title: 2. Confirm activation
step2.description: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your app.
